_comment: Regression test baseline. Updated by the regression-tester agent. Each key is a test name, value is {status, last_run, notes}.

pepper connects.notes: ping returns pong, look returns screen data with 18 interactive elements

look returns elements.notes: 18 interactive, 11 text elements on Controls tab

tap by text.notes: Tapped List tab, screen changed from Controls to List view with items

back navigation.notes: Navigated to Item 20 detail, back returned to List (can_go_back: false). Fix in #780/#778 confirmed.

input text into field.notes: Text field shows 'test input 123' after input command

scroll down.notes: Scrolled 200pt on List tab, content shifted

scroll to element.notes: scroll with text 'Item 40' returns 'Element not found by text' — lazy list items not in tree until scrolled into view

scroll to element (deprecated scroll_to).notes: scroll_to command times out (WebSocket connection lost: timed out); batch also times out

look scope filtering.notes: scope parameter does not filter output; returns all 18 elements regardless of container

look compact mode.notes: Second compact call returns full output (18 elements, same keys), not diff

find by predicate.notes: Found 36 buttons with type == 'button', all correct type

read element properties.notes: read command requires 'element' param (accessibility ID); text-based lookup not supported

screen name.notes: Returns screen_id, VC type, tab info (3 tabs), navigation stack, can_go_back

appearance toggle.notes: dark and light modes switched cleanly, both returned mode confirmation

network monitoring.notes: Captured 1 HTTP request (httpbin.org/json, status 200); start/log/stop all succeeded

console capture.notes: start/log/stop succeeded; 0 lines captured (test app doesn't log, but functional flow works)

timeline flight recorder.notes: Returned 100 events including screen transitions and commands

snapshot save and diff.notes: Save captured 9 elements/22 texts on Misc tab. After navigating to Controls and tapping, diff showed 16 added/7 removed elements.

accessibility audit.notes: 6 issues (4 contrast errors, 1 placeholder contrast warning, 1 touch target warning), no crash

look on empty screen.notes: Returns without error on Controls tab, 18 interactive elements

tap nonexistent element.notes: Returns 'Element not found by text' error with clear message and suggestion, no crash
